payload.label: fan
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a ceiling-mounted fan showing three visible blades with alternating white and dark brown (wood-tone) finishes around a round central metal/light hub; the fan is edge-cropped, slightly blurred, viewed from below, approximately 2.0 m from the camera.
